info.name: IPMS - Invoice & Payroll Management API
info.description:
REST API collection for the Invoice & Payroll Management System (IPMS).

**Base URL:** Set `baseUrl` variable (default `http://localhost:3000`).

**Authentication:** Cookie-based Supabase session. After signup/login in the browser, copy session cookies into Postman, or call `POST /api/auth/signup` and use returned cookies.

**Demo credentials:** `demo@ipms.app` / `DemoIPMS2026!`

**Response format:** `{ "success": true, "data": ... }` or `{ "success": false, "error": { "message", "code" } }`

**Roles:** admin, accountant, hr, employee — endpoints enforce company-scoped access.

request.description: Create a new company and admin account.
Join an existing company using a 32+ char invite token.
Returns current user session and active company.
Records a login audit event (call after browser login).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Custom Invoice",
  "isDefault": false,
  "isActive": true,
  "theme": "modern",
  "branding": {
    "primaryColor": "#2563eb",
    "secondaryColor": "#1e40af",
    "fontFamily": "Inter",
    "sections": {
      "logo": true,
      "notes": true,
      "paymentTerms": true,
      "footer": true
    },
    "companyName": "Acme Corp",
    "companyAddress": "123 Main St",
    "paymentTerms": "Net 30",
    "footerText": "Thank you"
  }
}

request.description: Requires employee role with linked employee profile.
No authentication required. Uses invoice share token.
Protected by CRON_SECRET header in production.
